Metadata.title: Mohd Hanif Mohamad - Pegawai Tadbir UPSI
Metadata.description: Pegawai Tadbir at Universiti Pendidikan Sultan Idris (UPSI).

Hero.name: Mohd Hanif Mohamad
Hero.tagline: Administrative Officer at Universiti Pendidikan Sultan Idris.

About.heading: About Me
About.bio_1: I'm a passionate Full Stack Developer with experience in building web applications using modern technologies. I enjoy turning complex problems into simple, beautiful and intuitive solutions.
About.bio_2: When I'm not coding, you can find me exploring new technologies, contributing to open source, or enjoying a good cup of coffee.

Skills.heading: Skills & Technologies
Skills.subtitle: Technologies and tools I use to bring ideas to life.

Projects.heading: Projects
Projects.subtitle: A selection of projects I've worked on.
Projects.project1_description: A full-stack e-commerce platform with payment integration, user authentication, and admin dashboard.
Projects.project2_description: A collaborative task management application with real-time updates and team features.
Projects.project3_description: A modern portfolio website built with Next.js, featuring internationalization and dark mode.

Experience.heading: Work Experience
Experience.subtitle: My professional journey so far.
Experience.exp1_description: Led development of web applications, mentored junior developers, and implemented CI/CD pipelines.
Experience.exp2_description: Developed responsive web applications for various clients using React, Node.js, and cloud services.
Experience.exp3_description: Built and maintained web applications, collaborated with the design team on UI/UX improvements.

Blog.heading: Blog
Blog.subtitle: Thoughts, tutorials, and insights about web development.
Blog.post1_title: Getting Started with Next.js App Router
Blog.post1_excerpt: A comprehensive guide to building modern web applications with Next.js App Router and Server Components.
Blog.post2_excerpt: Deep dive into TypeScript generics and how to use them effectively in your projects.
Blog.post3_excerpt: Best practices for creating web applications that are accessible to everyone.
